articles.author: Juli Clover
articles.title: EU Orders Google to Give Rival AI Apps the Same Android Access as Gemini - MacRumors
articles.description: The European Commission today formally ordered Google to give third-party AI services the same access to Android device features that Gemini has....
articles.content: The European Commission today formally ordered Google to give third-party AI services the same access to Android device features that Gemini has. Europe's Digital Markets Act requires software makers… [+2725 chars]
